lines.original: Ho munda hunda dhuppa vich tan kudiye
lines.translated: I get tanned running after you in the sun, girl
lines.note: Matches glossary preferred rendering; literal and lyrical.

lines.original: Ni tu kade laaye nahiyon ankhiyan ton shade
lines.translated: but you never even take your glasses off to look at me

lines.original: Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
lines.translated: Here a jatt wouldn't even add water, darling
lines.note: Conservative, literal rendering of boastful line about not diluting a drink; 'sohniye' rendered as 'darling'.

lines.original: Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
lines.translated: You like lemonade in your drink
lines.note: Kept neutral rather than slangy; matches song's repeated line about lemonade.

lines.original: Ho munda hunda dhuppa vich tan kudiye
lines.translated: I get tanned running after you in the sun, girl
lines.note: Matches glossary preferred rendering; literal and lyrical.

lines.original: Ni tu kade laaye nahiyon ankhiyan ton shade
lines.translated: but you never even take your glasses off to look at me

lines.original: Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
lines.translated: Here a jatt wouldn't even add water, darling
lines.note: Conservative, literal rendering of boastful line about not diluting a drink; 'sohniye' rendered as 'darling'.

lines.original: Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
lines.translated: You like lemonade in your drink
lines.note: Kept neutral rather than slangy; matches song's repeated line about lemonade.

lines.original: Kudi jivein nikali ae kise romantic gaane cho
lines.translated: You look like you stepped out of a romantic song
lines.note: Complimentary, cinematic image; literal and natural.

lines.original: Tu labhdi ae Snapchat te munda labhe thaane cho
lines.translated: You can be found on Snapchat, but I am only found at the police station
lines.note: Follows glossary preferred rendering even though original is idiomatic/ambiguous.

lines.original: Main te kara avoid kudi nu oh mangdi mera phone ae
lines.translated: I avoid the girl; she asks for my phone
lines.note: Literal and conservative rendering of the interaction.

lines.original: Sadde puthe kam sohniye 24 ghante on ae
lines.translated: Our boys are working 24 hours
lines.note: Conservative rendering of the bragging line about constant activity.

lines.original: Oh jaadon dekhe jattan de subha athre
lines.translated: When she sees the jatt's morning look
lines.note: Original phrase is dialectal/uncertain; this is a conservative, literal guess.

lines.original: Tere love shove sare ho jane aa fade
lines.translated: All your love shows will fade
lines.note: Conservative, idiomatic English keeping the intended meaning (love displays losing value).

lines.original: Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
lines.translated: Here a jatt wouldn't even add water, darling
lines.note: Conservative, literal rendering of boastful line about not diluting a drink; 'sohniye' rendered as 'darling'.

lines.original: Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
lines.translated: You like lemonade in your drink
lines.note: Kept neutral rather than slangy; matches song's repeated line about lemonade.

lines.original: Ho munda hunda dhuppa vich tan kudiye
lines.translated: I get tanned running after you in the sun, girl
lines.note: Matches glossary preferred rendering; literal and lyrical.

lines.original: Ni tu kade laaye nahiyon ankhiyan ton shade
lines.translated: but you never even take your glasses off to look at me

lines.original: Aithe jatt paani vi ni paunda sohniye
lines.translated: Here a jatt wouldn't even add water, darling
lines.note: Conservative, literal rendering of boastful line about not diluting a drink; 'sohniye' rendered as 'darling'.

lines.original: Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
lines.translated: You like lemonade in your drink
lines.note: Kept neutral rather than slangy; matches song's repeated line about lemonade.

lines.original: Turi jaandi nu main aawaaz maar ke saddh leya
lines.translated: As you started to walk away, I called out and made you stop
lines.note: 'saddh leya' can mean 'stopped', 'made sit', or 'pulled back'—kept neutral.

lines.original: Betha leya vich gaddi de puchheya kithe chhad deyan
lines.translated: I put you in the car and asked where to drop you off

lines.original: Sangdi sangdi ne ohne haathan naal muh khajj leya
lines.translated: Acting shy, she covered her mouth with her hands
lines.note: 'sangdi sangdi' = shyly/coyly.

lines.original: Main keha chalde aa ni yacht private aaj leya
lines.translated: I said while we were driving that I got a private yacht today
lines.note: 'chalde aa ni' is colloquial filler meaning 'while moving/driving'.

lines.original: Oh kade billo seaside kaade jet te
lines.translated: Sometimes, girl, she's at the seaside on a jet
lines.note: 'billo' = affectionate 'babe' or 'girl'.

lines.original: Kithe ni tu samjhengi jattan de trade
lines.translated: You won't understand the jatts' trade.
lines.note: ‘trade’ here means ways/ways of life of the jatt (see glossary).

lines.original: Aithe jatt paani vi ni paaunda sohniye
lines.translated: Here, a jatt wouldn't even add water, darling
lines.note: jatt = tough Punjabi man/bro; 'sohniye' = darling.

lines.original: Tainu teri daaru ch pasand ae lemonade
lines.translated: You like lemonade in your drink
lines.note: Kept neutral rather than slangy; matches song's repeated line about lemonade.
